Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 293 

PTCD_INDICATOR_20 

LABEL: Indicates Whether the Reference Year Plan is Part C, Part D, or Both 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan for the Current Year (2020) is Medicare Part C, Part D, or 
both. All Part C and D plans are included in the file. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 1 = Part C only plan (any non-FFS; not all are
